idea: Implement ralph-burning-9ni.8.3: Claim a bead and create a corresponding Ralph task. Turn a selected bead into an owned task run by claiming it in br and creating the corresponding Ralph project/task. After the selector transitions to claimed state, the controller should: (1) claim the bead via br update --status=in_progress, (2) generate the bead-backed prompt, (3) create a Ralph task/project from the prompt linking it to the milestone and bead via task_source metadata, (4) update milestone state recording the claim and linked task_id, (5) transition controller from claimed to running. If br claim fails, transition to needs_operator. Claiming and task creation should be as atomic as possible.
